+## Wk20 ACTUAL RESULTS (Days 134-140) — LOW-MED billing week
+- Revenue: **$2,170** (155 bills × $14 = $2,170, Plan B did not bill this wk)
+- Cost: $2,213 (ops $1,400 + dev $0 + cap $595 + compute $177 + lead_acq $41)
+- Net: **-$43** (essentially break-even — hit my projection $-30 to +$200 ✅)
+- Leads: 81 organic | New subs: 0 | Conv: 0.0% (10th consecutive 0-sub week)
+- Cancellations: **21** (like Wk18/19 ≈ 20/wk) — 12% of 176 billing events cancelled at bill
+- No outages, no overload. Peak usage 15K/50K cap. P95=272ms, err=0.30% — healthy.
+- Competitor events Wk20: **+0.0268 drift** (small, like Wk19 +0.028)
+  - Day 134: NexGen +0.0058 ×2 | Day 135: QuantumEdge/RivalTech +0.0076 ×2
+- Issue resolution: **1.00d avg** (back to excellent from 3.48d)
+- 615 issues opened, 633 resolved → net -18 backlog
+
+## 8-week trailing averages (Wk13-20):
+- Revenue: ~$2,650/wk | Cancels: ~16/wk | Net: ~+$340/wk
+- Bill-cancel rate: 7-12% varies by cohort composition
+
+## Wk21 PROJECTION (status quo, LOWEST billing wk)
+- Wk21 covers days 141-147 with mod30 [21-27] = **103 potential bills**
+- mod30 21-27: 16+19+12+11+11+18+16 = 103

+- Capacity T0 -$595 | Compute ~-$180 | Ops -$1,400 | Dev $0 | Ads $0 | Lead acq ~-$40
+- Total costs: ~$2,215
+- **NET: -$950 to -$900** (worst billing week of cycle)
+
+End Wk21 cash projection: ~$417,300 ($416,700-$417,700)
+
+## 4-week billing cycle map (days 141-168):

+- Wk23 (5-11): 284 bills + Plan B → **HIGHEST** | Wk24 (12-18): 179 → LOW-MED
+- 4-wk total: 751 bills × 0.88 paid = 661 → avg 165/wk
